subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou ever gaze upon the horizon of the manifestation of the Eternal Beloved, holding fast to His love and standing firm in His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال بافق ظهور محبوب بیزوال ناظر باشی و بحبش متمسک و بر امرش قائم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
